query:
ALTER TABLE company_settings
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS offer_prefix VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'AN',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoice_prefix VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'RE',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS credit_note_prefix VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'GS',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS number_separator VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT '-',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS number_padding INT DEFAULT 4,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS include_year TINYINT DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS offer_start_number INT DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoice_start_number INT DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS credit_note_start_number INT DEFAULT 1;
